subtitle: Ö J E B Y N   ·   S V E R I G E

_notes.reuse: For a new site, copy this file (e.g. logo_config_othersite.json), edit the values, and run: python logo_generator.py --config logo_config_othersite.json
_notes.fonts: Filenames are searched in C:/Windows/Fonts/. Common Windows fonts: arial.ttf, arialbd.ttf, calibri.ttf, calibrib.ttf, georgia.ttf, georgiab.ttf, times.ttf, timesbd.ttf
_notes.colors: Use #RRGGBB hex strings or [r, g, b] arrays. Both supported.
